items.title: Iran says deal with US ‘not imminent’ despite progress
items.standfirst: Iran’s FM spokesman Baghaei says a ‘large portion’ of issues with the US have been resolved, but a deal is not imminent.
items.content: Iran’s FM spokesman Baghaei says a ‘large portion’ of issues with the US have been resolved, but a deal is not imminent.

items.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal emerging, while war threats still loom
items.standfirst: President Trump and other administration officials are tempering expectations raised of an imminent agreement to end the war in Iran while Iranian officials have signaled there are still disagreements on key issues.
items.content: President Trump and other administration officials are tempering expectations raised of an imminent agreement to end the war in Iran while Iranian officials have signaled there are still disagreements on key issues.(Image credit: AFP via Getty Images)

items.title: Iran says no deal ‘imminent’ despite progress in talks with U.S.
items.standfirst: Iran warned Monday that an agreement to end the war with the United States was not imminent, after President Donald Trump raised and then lowered expectations that a deal may be close
items.content: Iran warned Monday that an agreement to end the war with the United States was not imminent, after President Donald Trump raised and then lowered expectations that a deal may be close

items.title: Donald Trump slows momentum towards an Iran agreement
items.standfirst: US President Donald Trump has tempered expectations of a swift agreement with Iran despite signs of progress in negotiations. The talks reportedly focus on Iran pledging not to acquire nuclear weapons in exchange for possible sanctions relief and an easing of US economic pressure.
items.content: US President Donald Trump has tempered expectations of a swift agreement with Iran despite signs of progress in negotiations. The talks reportedly focus on Iran pledging not to acquire nuclear weapons in exchange for possible sanctions relief and an easing of US economic pressure.

items.title: Trump says he won't 'rush into' deal to end war with Iran
items.standfirst: President Trump said Sunday that he will not “rush into a deal” to end the ongoing U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.” It comes a day after the president said that a potential deal was “largely negotiated.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.
items.content: President Trump said Sunday that he will not “rush into a deal” to end the ongoing U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.” It comes a day after the president said that a potential deal was “largely negotiated.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.

items.title: Trump speaks with Israel’s prime minister on potential Iran agreement
items.standfirst: President Trump posted on his social media platform on Saturday that an agreement to end the war with Iran has been “largely negotiated,” adding that he also spoke with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.
items.content: President Trump posted on his social media platform on Saturday that an agreement to end the war with Iran has been “largely negotiated,” adding that he also spoke with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.

items.title: Trump says he won’t ‘rush’ into a deal with Iran, softening hopes of an imminent agreement
items.standfirst: President Donald Trump said he won’t “rush into a deal” to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.”
items.content: President Donald Trump said he won’t “rush into a deal” to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.”

items.title: Yamal in Spain’s World Cup squad, but no room for Real Madrid players
items.standfirst: Yamal, one of eight Barcelona players named in the 26-man squad, with seven Arsenal players picked by Luis de la Fuente.
items.content: Yamal, one of eight Barcelona players named in the 26-man squad, with seven Arsenal players picked by Luis de la Fuente.

items.title: Yamal headlines Spain squad as Real Madrid stars miss World Cup cut
items.standfirst: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente named teenage sensation Lamine Yamal to his 2026 World Cup squad on Monday, while recalling Mikel Merino and Gavi after injury layoffs and excluding Real Madrid players for the first time in the nation’s World Cup history.
items.content: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente named teenage sensation Lamine Yamal to his 2026 World Cup squad on Monday, while recalling Mikel Merino and Gavi after injury layoffs and excluding Real Madrid players for the first time in the nation’s World Cup history.

items.title: Moment of gas explosion at China coal mine
items.standfirst: At least 82 people have been killed and two are missing after a gas explosion at a coal mine in northern China on Sunday, officials say.
items.content: At least 82 people have been killed and two are missing after a gas explosion at a coal mine in northern China on Sunday, officials say.

items.title: Authorities investigate safety lapses after China coal mine blast kills at least 82
items.standfirst: Authorities in northern China were investigating a coal mine operator with a focus on safety lapses as rescuers searched for those missing in the country’s deadliest coal mine explosion in recent years, which killed at least 82 people.
items.content: Authorities in northern China were investigating a coal mine operator with a focus on safety lapses as rescuers searched for those missing in the country’s deadliest coal mine explosion in recent years, which killed at least 82 people.

items.title: BBC at the site of China's worst mining disaster in more than a decade
items.standfirst: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.
items.content: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.

items.title: China mine death toll at least 82 after gas blast
items.standfirst: Xi Jinping urges authorities to ‘spare no effort’ in rescue operation after explosion in northern Shanxi provinceAt least 82 people have been killed in a gas explosion at a coalmine in northern China’s Shanxi province, in the country’s worst mining disaster in 17 years.The explosion happened on Friday at 7.29pm (12.29 BST) while 247 workers were underground at the Liushenyu coalmine in Qinyuan county, the state media agency Xinhua reported. Continue reading...
items.content: Xi Jinping urges authorities to ‘spare no effort’ in rescue operation after explosion in northern Shanxi provinceAt least 82 people have been killed in a gas explosion at a coalmine in northern China’s Shanxi province, in the country’s worst mining disaster in 17 years.The explosion happened on Friday at 7.29pm (12.29 BST) while 247 workers were underground at the Liushenyu coalmine in Qinyuan county, the state media agency Xinhua reported. items.title: Crews working California chemical leak in Orange County make cautious progress in overnight operation, officials say

items.content: More than 50,000 people in California remain evacuated due to an Orange County chemical leak that prompted Gov. Newsom to request that President Trump issue a Federal Emergency Declaration.

items.title: What to know about a leaking California chemical tank that may explode
items.standfirst: The tank at GKN Aerospace is estimated to contain 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate, a volatile chemical used to produce plastics.
items.content: The tank at GKN Aerospace is estimated to contain 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate, a volatile chemical used to produce plastics.

items.content: Southern California officials are desperately searching for a safe resolution to a leaking toxic chemical tank at an aerospace facility.

items.title: California declares state of emergency as crews race to contain toxic chemical leak
items.standfirst: Thousands were evacuated after officials warned that a tank holding about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode. [bbc.com]
items.content: Thousands were evacuated after officials warned that a tank holding about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode. [bbc.com]

clusters.title: Ebola outbreak raises fears of wider spread in Central Africa
clusters.neutral_headline: Ebola outbreak raises fears of wider spread in Central Africa
bullet_summary: An Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda is raising fears of wider spread, with over 900 suspected cases and more than 200 deaths reported in the DRC
Reported by France24, Sky News World

items.title: Ebola outbreak raises fears of wider spread in Central Africa
items.standfirst: An Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda is raising fears of wider spread, with over 900 suspected cases and more than 200 deaths reported in the DRC. Health workers warn the toll is likely higher due to limited testing, while conflict, mistrust, and lack of treatment for the rare strain are hampering containment efforts.
items.content: An Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda is raising fears of wider spread, with over 900 suspected cases and more than 200 deaths reported in the DRC. Health workers warn the toll is likely higher due to limited testing, while conflict, mistrust, and lack of treatment for the rare strain are hampering containment efforts.

items.title: Suspected Ebola cases in DR Congo outbreak jump to more than 900
items.standfirst: The number of suspected Ebola cases has jumped to more than 900 in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), where authorities are struggling to contain an outbreak.
items.content: The number of suspected Ebola cases has jumped to more than 900 in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), where authorities are struggling to contain an outbreak.
